title: Borinda mairei
taxonomy: Borinda mairei is a species of bamboo. Borinda mairei belongs to the genus Borinda and the family Poaceae. This genus is a part of the subfamily Bambusoideae and the order Poales. The classification of Borinda mairei is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukaryota. Overall, Borinda mairei's classification reflects its position within the plant kingdom.
